impact: This advances the PP&D plan by making daemon operation auditable and repeatable without touching private DevHub data, crawl outputs, or non-PP&D workspaces.
summary: Add dedicated PP&D daemon operations documentation for starting, stopping, and inspecting local daemon state.
target_task: Task checkbox-18: Add operations documentation for starting, stopping, and inspecting the PP&D daemon.

command: files=$(find ppd -name '*.ts' -not -path '*/node_modules/*' -print); test -z "$files" || npx tsc --noEmit --target ES2020 --module ESNext --moduleResolution node --strict --skipLibCheck --types node $files
